pages.title: Lost Souls
pages.text: Wondering souls that have been summoned by $(l:creatures/shade_of_leonard)Shade of Leonard$(/l), with enhanced powers and forced to combat to protect it. Each soul will last naturally for a short timespan

pages.title: Fighting Lost Souls
pages.text: Lost Souls will protect Leonard from any attack and as long as they exist it cannot be harmed.$(p)$(2)$(bold)Green Souls$() can be armed by any means;$(p)$(c)$(bold)Red Souls$() can only be armed by $(item)Fire$();$(p)$(8)$(bold)Black Souls$() can only be harmed by $(item)Magic$().
